sign(5): positive
sign(-3): negative
sign(0): zero
bucket(0): zero
bucket(150): big
bucket(42): answer
bucket(-1): negative
bucket(7): ordinary
bumpsLookup(7): matches threshold lookups=1
bumpsLookup(8): doesn't match threshold lookups=1
usesPredicateFn(5): positive (via fn)
usesPredicateFn(-5): non-positive
lazyResults(0): zero hits=1
lazyResults(5): pos hits=1
lazyResults(-5): neg hits=1
describe(Red): warm
describe(Green): natural
describe(Blue): cool
category("alpha"): A
category("zebra"): Z-prefixed
category("longish"): long
category("hi"): misc
